_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_29_note: Session 29 (2026-05-28): NVDA pre-Computex deep session. (1) NVIDIA to invest $150B annually in Taiwan; groundbroke 'Constellation' HQ in Taipei (4,000 employees by 2030); (2) Jensen Huang private dinner with TSMC Chairman C.C. Wei to lock in CoWoS-L capacity for Vera Rubin — NVIDIA holds ~60% global CoWoS capacity; (3) Jensen Huang confirmed special guest at MRVL Computex June 2 keynote — NVLink Fusion $2B partnership showcase reframes custom silicon as ecosystem integration, not NVIDIA substitution; (4) Computex June 1 preview: Dynamo 1.0 GA, N1X ARM laptop chip, Vera Rubin NVL72 deep-dive; (5) NVIDIA foresees $3-4T annual AI infra by 2030. ASML supplementary: CEO confirms first High-NA EUV chips 'within months' (May 19). MRVL supplementary: Jensen keynote confirmation captured. No DCF (NVDA last run May 21, <30 days). Phases 1b/1c gated (29%6=5). ANET event removed from queue (no action required). NVDA event updated to post-June-1-keynote pending. Next session priority: post-June-1 NVDA keynote deep session.

event_queue.event: Computex June 1 (Mon) Jensen Huang GTC Taipei keynote 11am Taipei time — Session 29 pre-Computex update complete. Session 30 priority: capture keynote output. Key watch: Vera Rubin NVL72 production volume guidance (1.5M units); Dynamo 1.0 GA details; N1X ARM laptop chip (MediaTek); CoWoS capacity commentary.

Computex June 2 joint keynote: Matt Murphy + Jensen Huang ('The Future of AI Depends on Connectivity'). NVLink Fusion showcase; Google TPU/MPU volume update; 4th hyperscaler (Meta MTIA) confirmation; Scorpio X vs. XConn head-to-head. Session 30: update MRVL entity after keynote.

Northland downgrade to Market Perform (May 26, no PT). Computex June 3 press conference + Scorpio X live demo (10-11am Taipei). Head-to-head vs. MRVL XConn PCIe 6 switch. Session 30/31: update ALAB entity after Computex outcome.

_event_queue_note: Session 29: NVDA pre-Computex update complete; June 1 keynote still pending (Session 30). MRVL event updated with Jensen Huang joint keynote confirmation. ALAB event held for June 3 Computex demo. ANET event removed (no action required — price correction captured). After Computex cycle (June 1-5) processed, resume ASML rotation.
